issues.description: DSL is missing the SearchDeck action. Card text requires: (1) look at 5 cards from deck, (2) reveal up to 1 Upper Yard and ADD TO HAND, (3) place rest at bottom in any order, (4) then play up to 1 Upper Yard from hand. Current DSL only covers reveal+play, omitting the search/draw phase entirely.
RevealFromHand is incorrect action type. The card reveals from deck (SearchDeck), not from hand. After revealing and adding to hand, THEN play from hand.
Missing proper sequencing: SearchDeck (look at 5, add 1 Upper Yard to hand, arrange rest) must complete before PlayFromHand can execute. Current structure does not establish this dependency.
